Variables.Name: OutputDirectory
Variables.Description: The directory to output the captured file(s) in

Variables.Name: GameModeOverride
Variables.Description: Optional game mode to override the map's default game mode with.  This can be useful if the game's normal mode displays UI elements or loading screens that you don't want captured.

Variables.Name: bOverwriteExisting
Variables.Description: Whether to overwrite existing files or not

Variables.Name: bUseRelativeFrameNumbers
Variables.Description: True if frame numbers in the output files should be relative to zero, rather than the actual frame numbers in the originating animation content

Variables.Name: HandleFrames
Variables.Description: Number of frame handles to include for each shot

Variables.Name: ZeroPadFrameNumbers
Variables.Description: How much to zero-pad frame numbers on filenames

Variables.Name: FrameRate
Variables.Description: The frame rate at which to capture

Variables.Name: BitRate
Variables.Description: The bit rate at which to capture

Variables.Name: Resolution
Variables.Description: The resolution at which to capture

Variables.Name: bEnableTextureStreaming
Variables.Description: Whether to texture streaming should be enabled while capturing.  Turning off texture streaming may cause much more memory to be used, but also reduces the chance of blurry textures in your captured video.

Variables.Name: bCinematicEngineScalability
Variables.Description: Whether to enable cinematic engine scalability settings

Variables.Name: bCinematicMode
Variables.Description: Whether to enable cinematic mode whilst capturing

Variables.Name: bAllowMovement
Variables.Description: Whether to allow player movement whilst capturing

Variables.Name: bAllowTurning
Variables.Description: Whether to allow player rotation whilst capturing

Variables.Name: bShowPlayer
Variables.Description: Whether to show the local player whilst capturing

Variables.Name: bShowHUD
Variables.Description: Whether to show the in-game HUD whilst capturing
